case_title: MUNOZ, CANDELARIO VS POMART, ROBERTO JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POMART, ROBERTO JOSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, CANDELARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POMART, ROBERTO JOSE POMART, IDILIA $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22.00, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS ARE EACH RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLE RECORDS INDICATE THAT THE PLAINTIFF'S CAR WAS SALVAGED ON 3/7/02.
